description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized shotgun with a compact, angular design reminiscent of voxel art. The main body is rectangular with a prominent, squared-off stock at the rear and a thick, boxy barrel extending forward. A large, rectangular trigger guard and pistol grip are visible beneath the main body, and a magazine protrudes downward in front of the grip, suggesting a tactical or modern design. The upper receiver features an open, rail-like structure, possibly for mounting optics or accessories. The entire object is rendered in a uniform dark color, giving it a minimalist, digital appearance with no visible textures or fine detailing.
description: A blocky, dark-colored shotgun with a squared stock, boxy barrel, and prominent pistol grip, rendered in a minimalist, voxel-art style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the squared stock, boxy barrel, pistol grip, and protruding magazine.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and a small blue detail on the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 with the same key features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the narrow stock and the overall slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, medium length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, large, blocky with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
